nodes.name: composables.test.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest test suite for useWorkStages, useTagInput, and useFileUpload composables with edge case coverage.

nodes.name: useFileUpload.ts
nodes.summary: File upload composable providing drag-and-drop state, file validation, progress tracking, and abort controller support.

nodes.name: useI18n.ts
nodes.summary: Lightweight i18n composable with zh-CN/en-US message dictionaries, localStorage persistence, and HTML lang synchronization.

nodes.name: useKeyboard.ts
nodes.summary: Keyboard event handler composable accepting a key-to-handler map with bind/unbind lifecycle methods.

nodes.name: useModal.ts
nodes.summary: Modal state management composable with open/close/confirmation variants and ESC-key dismissal.

nodes.name: useProductDesigner.ts
nodes.summary: 7-step wizard state manager for design-to-product conversion with localStorage persistence and typed state interface.

nodes.name: useTagInput.ts
nodes.summary: Tag input composable with debounced API suggestion fetch, keyboard navigation (Enter/Backspace/Escape), and tag CRUD.

nodes.name: useToast.ts
nodes.summary: Toast notification composable with success/error/warning/info variants and auto-dismiss timer.

nodes.name: useWorkStages.ts
nodes.summary: Defines creation stage pipelines for 6 file types with lookup utilities for stage colors, indices, and type-based filtering.

nodes.name: env.d.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript environment declarations for Vite module resolution and global type augmentations.

nodes.name: useAppStore.ts
nodes.summary: Pinia store managing dark/light theme toggle, sidebar collapse state, and global badge counters with localStorage persistence.

nodes.name: useBusinessStore.ts
nodes.summary: Pinia store for business data: revenue CRUD, partner management, order status tracking, and notification polling.

nodes.name: useDashboardStore.ts
nodes.summary: Pinia store aggregating dashboard metrics: work counts, notarization stats, and revenue summaries.

nodes.name: useDictStore.ts
nodes.summary: Global dictionary data store with lazy loading, bulk fetch, label resolution, dropdown option generation for 15+ config groups.

nodes.name: useMonitorStore.ts
nodes.summary: Pinia store managing monitor tasks, scan results, brand watch tracking, domain watches, and whitelist management.

nodes.name: useNotaryStore.ts
nodes.summary: Pinia store for notarization records, certificate queries, evidence chain operations, and audit trail management.

nodes.name: useSettingsStore.ts
nodes.summary: Pinia store for user preference settings with per-section persistence and initialization from backend config.

nodes.name: useWorkStore.ts
nodes.summary: Pinia store for work CRUD: list, fetch, upload, update, delete, restore, trash operations, filtering, and pagination.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration with path aliases (@/, @/api, @/stores) and strict type checking for the frontend.

nodes.name: common.ts
nodes.summary: Shared TypeScript type definitions for common data structures, API response envelopes, and utility interfaces.

nodes.name: ipr.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript interfaces for IP registration entities: trademark classes, copyright registrations, and Nice classification.

nodes.name: monitor.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript interfaces for monitor entities: tasks, results, brand watches, domain watches, code similarity, whitelist suggestions.

nodes.name: notary.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript interfaces for notarization: records, certificates, C2PA chains, and audit trails.

nodes.name: publish.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript interfaces for publishing: product templates, monetization channels, campaigns, and license entities.

nodes.name: supply.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive TypeScript interfaces for supply chain: partners, orders, reminders, design listings, spec validation, and remediation.

nodes.name: work.ts
nodes.summary: Core Work interface with all fields including stages, metadata, tags, project association, and list query parameters.
